title: Schottenstein Property Group Inc ransomware incident

extortion.description: Schottenstein Property Group Inc is a company operates in the Real Estate industry. The company interest in 80 retail properties in 23 states and corporate information of it's customers and that is now in our possession. Some of them are big and well-known. Personal information is also in this case. Schottenstein doesn't care much this data so you will be able to see it soon.
